title: Urgent Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited:
NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Foundation Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
